controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (access criteria for nds-om) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India
(Access Criteria for NDS-OM) Directions, 2025..
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (access criteria for nds-om) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean export-import bank of india (exim bank), national bank for agriculture and rural development (nabard), national housing bank (nhb), small industr
controls.control_description:
"All India Financial Institution" shall mean Export-Import Bank of India
(EXIM Bank), National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development
(NABARD), National Housing Bank (NHB), Small Industries Development
Bank of India (SIDBI) and National Bank for Financing Infrastructure and
Development (NaBFID);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean export-import bank of india (exim bank), national bank for agriculture and rural development (nabard), national housing bank (nhb), small industr

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a banking company (including a local area bank, a payment bank and a small finance bank) as defined in clause (c) of section 5 of the banking reg
controls.control_description:
"Bank" shall mean a banking company (including a Local Area Bank, a
Payment Bank and a Small Finance Bank) as defined in clause (c) of section
5 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or a "regional rural bank", a
"corresponding new bank" or "State Bank of India" as defined in clauses (ja),

फोन: (91-22) 2260 1000;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a banking company (including a local area bank, a payment bank and a small finance bank) as defined in clause (c) of section 5 of the banking reg

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a bank appointed by the clearing corporation of india limited for the settlement of fund obligations of members of their securities settlement se
controls.control_description:
"Designated Settlement Bank (DSB)" shall mean a bank appointed by the
Clearing Corporation of India Limited for the settlement of fund obligations of
members of their securities settlement segment that are not maintaining a
current account with the Reserve Bank;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a bank appointed by the clearing corporation of india limited for the settlement of fund obligations of members of their securities settlement se

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean access to nds-om wherein an entity that is party to a transaction directly executes/reports the transaction on/to the platform and such transacti
controls.control_description:
"Direct Access" shall mean access to NDS-OM wherein an entity that is party
to a transaction directly executes/reports the transaction on/to the platform
and such transactions are settled in its own Subsidiary General Ledger (SGL)
account;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean access to nds-om wherein an entity that is party to a transaction directly executes/reports the transaction on/to the platform and such transacti

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(1) (iii) of the electronic trading platforms (reserve bank) directions, 2018 dated october 05, 20
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(1) (iii) of the electronic trading platforms (reserve bank) directions, 2018 dated october 05, 20

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(f) of the government securities act, 2006
controls.control_description:
"Government Security" shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in
Section 2(f) of the Government Securities Act, 2006;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(f) of the government securities act, 2006

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean access to nds-om wherein an entity undertakes its transactions through another entity that has a direct access to nds-om and which assumes respon
controls.control_description:
"Indirect Access" shall mean access to NDS-OM wherein an entity
undertakes its transactions through another entity that has a direct access to
NDS-OM and which assumes responsibility for settlement of such
transactions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean access to nds-om wherein an entity undertakes its transactions through another entity that has a direct access to nds-om and which assumes respon

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean the etp authorised by the reserve bank under the electronic trading platforms (reserve bank) directions, 2018 dated october 05, 2018, for transac
controls.control_description:
"Negotiated Dealing System-Order Matching (NDS-OM)" shall mean the
ETP authorised by the Reserve Bank under the Electronic Trading Platforms
(Reserve Bank) Directions, 2018 dated October 05, 2018, for transactions in
Government securities;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean the etp authorised by the reserve bank under the electronic trading platforms (reserve bank) directions, 2018 dated october 05, 2018, for transac

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 45-i (f) of the act
controls.control_description:
"Non-Banking Financial Company" shall have the same meaning as
assigned to it in Section 45-I (f) of the Act;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 45-i (f) of the act

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a mechanism through which a stock broker provides access to nds-om to its individual constituents / clients maintaining demat accounts with depos
controls.control_description:
"Stock Broker Connect" shall mean a mechanism through which a stock
broker provides access to NDS-OM to its individual constituents / clients
maintaining demat accounts with depositories registered with the Securities
and Exchange Board of India (SEBI).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a mechanism through which a stock broker provides access to nds-om to its individual constituents / clients maintaining demat accounts with depos

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to them in the act or under the government securities act, 2006
controls.control_description:
Words and expressions used, but not defined in these Directions, shall have the
same meaning as assigned to them in the Act or under the Government Securities
Act, 2006.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to them in the act or under the government securities act, 2006

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to access nds- om either through direct access or through indirect access or through stock broker connect, in terms of these directions
controls.control_description:
Any person/entity eligible to invest in Government securities in terms of the
applicable rules/ guidelines issued by the Government of India / State Governments
/ the Reserve Bank, as amended from time to time shall be eligible to access NDS-
OM either through direct access or through indirect access or through Stock Broker
Connect, in terms of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to access nds- om either through direct access or through indirect access or through stock broker connect, in terms of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible for direct access to nds-om subject to fulfilment of all requirements and conditions stipulated in these directions: a
controls.control_description:
Eligible Entities
The following entities shall be eligible for direct access to NDS-OM subject to
fulfilment of all requirements and conditions stipulated in these Directions:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible for direct access to nds-om subject to fulfilment of all requirements and conditions stipulated in these directions: a

controls.control_objective: To ensure specifically permit subject to such terms and conditions that it may prescribe
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specifically permit subject to such terms and conditions that it may prescribe

controls.control_objective: To ensure specifically permit
controls.control_description: Any other entity that the Reserve Bank may specifically permit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specifically permit

controls.control_objective: To ensure fulfil the following requirements: a
controls.control_description:
Requirements for seeking direct access to NDS-OM
Entities that are eligible to seek direct access to NDS-OM shall fulfil the following
requirements:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fulfil the following requirements: a

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek direct access by submitting an application, through the pravaah portal of the reserve bank, to the chief general manager, financial markets regul
controls.control_description:
Application for seeking direct access to NDS-OM
Entities eligible for direct access to NDS-OM in terms of paragraph (4) of these
Directions and meeting the requirements stipulated in paragraph (5) of these
Directions may seek direct access by submitting an application, through the
PRAVAAH portal of the Reserve Bank, to the Chief General Manager, Financial
Markets Regulation Department, Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek direct access by submitting an application, through the pravaah portal of the reserve bank, to the chief general manager, financial markets regul

controls.control_objective: To ensure , alternatively, seek direct access through the procedure stipulated under the master directions on access criteria for payment systems (master direct
controls.control_description:
Such entities may,
alternatively, seek direct access through the procedure stipulated under the Master
Directions on Access Criteria for Payment Systems (Master Direction
DPSS.CO.OD.No.1846/04.04.009/2016-17 dated January 17, 2017) as amended
from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , alternatively, seek direct access through the procedure stipulated under the master directions on access criteria for payment systems (master direct

controls.control_description:
Grant of direct access to NDS-OM
a) The Reserve Bank may, after being satisfied that the applicant fulfils the eligibility
criteria, grant direct access to NDS-OM subject to the terms and conditions that may
be stipulated therein.

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish such additional information and clarification
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish such additional information and clarification

controls.control_objective: To ensure initiate such steps as may be necessary, including imposing additional conditions
controls.control_description:
The Reserve
Bank may initiate such steps as may be necessary, including imposing additional
conditions, if the entity is found to violate the provisions of these Directions or any
other rules or regulations or conditions of access.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to initiate such steps as may be necessary, including imposing additional conditions

controls.control_objective: To ensure suspend/terminate the direct access to nds-om issued to an entity, after affording a reasonable opportunity to be heard
controls.control_description:
d) The Reserve Bank may suspend/terminate the direct access to NDS-OM issued
to an entity, after affording a reasonable opportunity to be heard, if it is satisfied that:
i.

controls.control_objective: To ensure avail indirect access to nds-om if: a
controls.control_description:
Any person/entity eligible to invest in Government securities may avail indirect
access to NDS-OM if:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to avail indirect access to nds-om if: a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be through an entity which has a direct access to nds-om, and which agrees to assume responsibility to settle the transactions undertaken by the entit
controls.control_description:
Indirect access to NDS-OM shall be through an entity which has a direct access
to NDS-OM, and which agrees to assume responsibility to settle the transactions
undertaken by the entity seeking indirect access.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be through an entity which has a direct access to nds-om, and which agrees to assume responsibility to settle the transactions undertaken by the entit

controls.control_objective: To ensure at its discretion, choose to avail indirect access to nds-om, instead of direct access
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to at its discretion, choose to avail indirect access to nds-om, instead of direct access

controls.control_objective: To ensure make an application, through the pravaah portal of the reserve bank, to the chief general manager, financial markets regulation department, reserve ba
controls.control_description:
An eligible stock broker desirous of providing access to its individual
constituents/clients maintaining demat accounts with depositories registered with
SEBI to NDS-OM may make an application, through the PRAVAAH portal of the
Reserve Bank, to the Chief General Manager, Financial Markets Regulation
Department, Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make an application, through the pravaah portal of the reserve bank, to the chief general manager, financial markets regulation department, reserve ba

controls.control_objective: To ensure , after being satisfied that the applicant fulfils the eligibility criteria, permit the applicant to provide access to nds-om to its constituents/clients
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank may, after being satisfied that the applicant fulfils the eligibility
criteria, permit the applicant to provide access to NDS-OM to its constituents/clients,
subject to any terms and conditions that may be stipulated therein.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , after being satisfied that the applicant fulfils the eligibility criteria, permit the applicant to provide access to nds-om to its constituents/clients

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, a
controls.control_description:
While granting such permission the Reserve Bank may, inter alia,
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, a

controls.control_objective: To ensure initiate such steps as may be necessary, including imposing additional conditions
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank may
initiate such steps as may be necessary, including imposing additional conditions, if
the entity is found to violate the provisions of these Directions or any other rules or
regulations or conditions for using the facility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to initiate such steps as may be necessary, including imposing additional conditions

controls.control_objective: To ensure suspend/terminate the approval provided to a stock broker after affording a reasonable opportunity to be heard
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank may suspend/terminate the approval provided to a stock
broker after affording a reasonable opportunity to be heard, if it is satisfied that:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to suspend/terminate the approval provided to a stock broker after affording a reasonable opportunity to be heard

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure compliance with all regulatory instructions issued by the reserve bank in this regard, as also any other terms and conditions that may be speci
controls.control_description:
While providing the access to NDS-OM to its constituents/clients, the stock
broker shall ensure compliance with all regulatory instructions issued by the Reserve
Bank in this regard, as also any other terms and conditions that may be specified by
the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure compliance with all regulatory instructions issued by the reserve bank in this regard, as also any other terms and conditions that may be speci

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in terms of the operational guidelines issued by ccil in this regard
controls.control_description:
The provision of such facility shall be in terms of the operational
guidelines issued by CCIL in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be in terms of the operational guidelines issued by ccil in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure have discretion in approving / rejecting / terminating the facility to a stock broker considering the need to ensure robustness of the market infrastr
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank shall have discretion in approving / rejecting / terminating the
facility to a stock broker considering the need to ensure robustness of the market
infrastructure and development of financial markets or in public interest or to regulate
the financial system of the country to its advantage.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have discretion in approving / rejecting / terminating the facility to a stock broker considering the need to ensure robustness of the market infrastr
